name: Cornish Pasties
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain it.
2. Cool the browned meat.
3. Add an envelope of onion soup mix to the cooled meat.
4. Grate the vegetables (cabbage, carrots, celery, onion, and potato).
5. Mix the grated vegetables with the meat mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Make the pastry by combining flour, margarine, and milk until crumbly.
8. Roll the pastry out to about 1/4-inch thickness and cut into circles.
9. Fill each circle with the meat filling and pinch the edges together.
10. Brush the pasties with egg.
11. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 20 minutes.
- The pasties can be frozen after baking.
- To reheat, place the frozen pasties on a baking sheet and heat in an oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes or until heated through.
